programs.title: Seven Sharp
programs.desc: Join Hilary Barry, Jeremy Wells and the team for a fresh perspective on today's stories.

programs.title: The Great British Bake Off
programs.desc: The bakers melt into Chocolate Week with fiddly mousse cups, a tricky tart and a fab fondue display. Whose fondue will get them through, and whose mousse will cut them loose?

programs.title: The Great British Sewing Bee
programs.desc: It’s Reduce, Reuse, Recycle week, with sewers creating a zero-waste jacket, transforming discarded tents and, inspired by the Make Do and Mend campaign, raiding wardrobes to create new outfits.

programs.title: Coronation Street
programs.desc: Long-running drama with the residents of England's most famous cobbled street.

programs.title: Deal Or No Deal Australia
programs.desc: Join host Grant Denyer for a round of this high pressure and high stakes game show, where contestants face up to the Banker and must decide: is it Deal or No Deal?

programs.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 Preview Series
programs.desc: As the FIFA World Cup 2026 fast approaches, this preview series looks at all the nations that will be competing across the United States, Canada and Mexico with the goal of lifting the World Cup.
